nodes.name: 🧩 Triggered by Workflow
nodes.notes: Call this workflow from another workflow via Execute Workflow node. Input JSON: { level, message, source, metadata, error_code, error_stack, user_id, request_id, ip_address }

nodes.name: 📣 Build Alert Payload
nodes.notes: Runs only for FATAL level. Extend this node to call Slack, PagerDuty, email etc.

parameters.jsCode:
// Return standardized error payload to the parent workflow
return [{ json: $input.first().json }];

setup: 1. Run schemas/app_log.sql in your PostgreSQL database
2. Create a Postgres credential in n8n (Settings → Credentials)
3. Update node '💾 Insert to DB' → set your credential ID
5. Call this workflow from another workflow using an Execute Workflow node
